title: psidium australe var. suffruticosum
intro: Psidium australe var. suffruticosum, also known as the Australian strawberry guava, is a small shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to aid digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, among other health benefits. The leaves and fruits of Psidium australe var. suffruticosum are often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
